pi_items.source: Code analysis of setup_task.sh and verifier.py confirming this exact path is used to assess task success.

privileged_info_summary: The task requires the agent to debug a dynamically generated, synthetic PsychoPy experiment ('broken_stroop.psyexp') which has five intentionally planted bugs. Analysis of the setup, task.json, and verifier.py scripts conclusively confirms that the expected output file path is exactly '/home/ga/PsychoPyExperiments/stroop_fixed.psyexp'.
